LanguageData.VPE_Hurricane.description: A Staticlord is creating a hurricane.
LanguageData.VPE_Hurricane.label: forced hurricane
LanguageData.VPE_IntenseShadows.label: intensified shadows
LanguageData.VPE_PsychicFlashstorm.description: A freak localized storm is blasting a small area with repeated lightning strikes.
LanguageData.VPE_PsychicFlashstorm.label: flashstorm
LanguageData.VPE_RaidPause.description: A Chronopath is pausing a raid.
LanguageData.VPE_RaidPause.label: paused raid
LanguageData.VPE_TimeQuake.label: time quake
